work.title: Resume Analyzer
description: ResumeAnalyzer is an LLM-powered tool that evaluates and analyzes resumes using pretrained language models.
It can run either fully offline with a local model or online with larger hosted models for better accuracy.
The project supports models from Ollama and OpenAI gpt-oss, allowing flexible deployment depending on your hardware and use case.

work.title: untitled game
description: Ever wondered what it feels like to be lost,
with no clue where to turn? In this immersive **3D first-person** adventure,
you find yourself dropped into a surreal, uncharted landscape with only
one promise: there's candy somewhere... if you can find it.
Built with Unity 3D, this game tests both your curiosity and courage,
creating an experience where the only way forward is through the unknown.
